summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Dental Clinic Appointment & Chatbot Web Application. Fixed critical MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue and Claude model naming issue. Backend APIs working correctly. Frontend UI functional with minor dropdown interaction issue.

fixed_critical_bugs.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error in appointment booking
fixed_critical_bugs.symptoms: 500 Internal Server Error when booking appointments
fixed_critical_bugs.fix_applied: Excluded MongoDB _id field from response to prevent JSON serialization error

fixed_critical_bugs.issue: Incorrect Claude model name causing AI chat fallback
fixed_critical_bugs.symptoms: Chat falling back to rule-based responses instead of AI

fixed_critical_bugs.issue: Chat booking flow showing None values in confirmation
fixed_critical_bugs.symptoms: Success message showing 'None at None' instead of actual date/time
fixed_critical_bugs.fix_applied: Store booking details in variables before clearing session state

ui_bugs.issue: Time and Service select dropdowns have interaction issues in automated testing
ui_bugs.symptoms: Options not easily selectable via automated scripts, though manual interaction works
ui_bugs.impact: May affect accessibility or automated testing, but manual usage appears functional

passed_tests: Appointment booking validation (past dates, invalid services)
Dashboard layout and service cards display
action_item_for_main_agent: Consider improving dropdown UI components for better accessibility and automated testing support. The select elements work manually but have interaction issues with automation tools.
